job_title: Senior Data Analyst- Remote (Healthcare exp Req)
job_description:
# Senior Data Analyst- Remote (Healthcare exp Req)
Company: Med-Metrix
Source: Indeed
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.indeed.com/viewjob?jk=40263efb74b1bffd

## Highlights
- Remote senior healthcare data analyst role.
- Requires advanced SQL, healthcare experience, data warehousing and ETL concepts, data validation and reconciliation, dashboards, KPI support, and stakeholder communication.
- Includes root-cause analysis, quality standards, and partnership with data engineering teams.
- Strong overall match to current payer ETL and healthcare analytics work.
strengths: Excellent overlap with healthcare, advanced SQL, ETL concepts, reconciliation, and reporting.
Resume supports dashboarding, KPI reporting, and cross-functional stakeholder work.
Remote full-time role with strong domain relevance.
gaps: Senior title may raise expectations around leadership scope beyond current resume emphasis.
Broader BI ownership may require more sustained dashboard development than the resume foregrounds.
notes: High-priority target. Tailor toward healthcare SQL analytics, ETL validation, KPI reporting, root-cause analysis, and data quality standards. Keep leadership framing to workstream ownership and collaboration rather than people management.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Senior Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL | ETL Validation | Reporting Quality

replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.
replacements.replace: Senior Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience transforming complex healthcare data into reliable analytics and reporting outcomes. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Strong fit for remote healthcare analyst roles that require KPI reporting, reconciliation, root-cause analysis, and trusted partnership with business and engineering teams.

replacements.find: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query)
replacements.replace: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query), KPI and performance reporting

replacements.find: Contributed to data quality and reporting accuracy initiatives that reduced post-release data hotfixes by ~25% and improved stakeholder trust in payer-operations dashboards and downstream KPIs.
replacements.replace: Contributed to data quality and reporting accuracy initiatives that reduced post-release data hotfixes by ~25% and improved stakeholder trust in dashboards, KPI reporting, and downstream analytics.
